expectedClassifications.testName: Expect columns to be visible when filled with data - Favorites Usage tab
expectedClassifications.notes: Source has route intercepts + one toHaveText assertion. Target has same route intercepts + POM delegation (selectTeamAndSubmit, expectColumnsVisibleAndNonNull) with resolved assertions + 2 additional inline toBeVisible assertions. Target weight > 2x source weight.

expectedClassifications.testName: Expect table to be empty if a team is not selected - Favorites Usage tab
expectedClassifications.notes: Source and target have similar structure: waitFor empty message, click update, verify empty. Both have route intercepts. Weight ratio within PARITY band.

expectedClassifications.testName: Test columns sorting - Favorites Usage tab
expectedClassifications.notes: Source has route intercept + column button clicks but no assertions (sorting verification hidden in opaque helpers). Target has route intercepts + POM methods with resolved assertions. Target weight > 2x source weight.
